sections.description: This is Public Law 101-532, enacted on November 7, 1990.

This section authorizes and requests the President to issue a proclamation asking state governors, local government officials, and the American public to observe an anniversary with appropriate ceremonies and activities.

summary: This bill is Public Law 101-532, enacted in 1990, which calls for the commemoration of a particular anniversary. It authorizes and requests the President to issue a proclamation encouraging governors, local officials, and the public to mark the occasion with appropriate ceremonies and activities.
